nasb.text: But if he has wronged you in any way or owes you anything, charge that to my account;

esv.text: If he has wronged you at all, or owes you anything, charge that to my account.

cnv.text: 如果他使你受了損失，或欠你甚麼，都記在我的帳上。

ccb.text: 如果他得罪你，或亏欠你什么，都记在我的账上吧。

csbs.text: 如果他亏负过你什么，或现在欠了你什么，请把它算在我的账上。
